project.name: genai-retail-platform
project.description: A microservices-based retail platform utilizing Spring Boot, Spring Cloud Gateway, and OpenTelemetry for distributed tracing.

layers.name: Infrastructure & Orchestration
layers.description: Cross-cutting infrastructure, container orchestration, and system-wide documentation.

layers.name: Edge Gateway
layers.description: The entry point for all client requests, providing routing, security filtering (JWT), and cross-cutting concerns like tracing.

layers.name: Authentication & Identity Service
layers.description: Microservice responsible for user registration, authentication, and JWT issuance.

layers.name: Product Management Service
layers.description: Microservice for managing product catalog, including search, categorization, and CRUD operations.

tour.title: Project Overview & Orchestration
tour.description: Welcome to the GenAI Retail Platform. This project is a microservices-based retail system. The docker-compose.yaml file orchestrates the entire system, including databases, observability tools, and the microservices themselves.

tour.title: Edge Gateway: The Entry Point
tour.description: The Gateway Service is the single entry point for all external traffic. GatewayServiceApplication boots the Spring Cloud Gateway, while RouteConfig defines how requests are routed to the underlying microservices like Auth and Product services.

tour.title: Security & Identity Management
tour.description: Authentication is handled by the Auth Service. Users can register and login via AuthController. The Gateway enforces security using JwtAuthenticationFilter, which validates JWT tokens issued by the Auth Service before allowing requests to proceed.

tour.title: Product Catalog Service
tour.description: The Product Service manages the core retail data. ProductController exposes REST endpoints for CRUD operations and search. ProductService contains the business logic, while ProductRepository handles persistence to the PostgreSQL database.

tour.title: Observability & Distributed Tracing
tour.description: Distributed tracing is integrated throughout the platform using OpenTelemetry. otel-collector-config.yaml configures the trace collection pipeline, and services use custom tracing configurations to ensure context propagation across microservice boundaries.
